step1.heading: Basic information
step1.intro: Title, description, cover image and schedule.

step1.waitingRoomAudioHelp: Played before the live call starts.
step1.parseTitleKickerHelp: When on, a title like 'CONFERENCE | Digital innovation' renders CONFERENCE as a small kicker line above the main title.
step1.maxParticipantsHelp: Estimate the maximum number of participants. Drives video server capacity and waiting-room UI.

validation.endsAt: End date must be after start date.

step1.senderRatioHelp: How many participants you expect to have mic/camera active. Helps size the video server.

step2.heading: Who can do what
step2.intro: Permission matrix: pick which roles can use each feature. Moderators can always do everything.

qa.label: Q&A
qa.desc: Submit questions to the Q&A panel.

chat.desc: Post messages in the group chat.

step3.heading: People and invites
step3.intro: Add organizers (shown on the page), moderators, speakers, and invited guests.
step3.organizersHelp: Appear on the public event page.
step3.organizerRequired: Contact name and organization are required.
step3.moderatorsHelp: Moderators can manage the session and control permissions during the event.
step3.speakersHelp: Receive a moderator link via email.
step3.invitationsHelp: Pre-registered attendees — each gets a personal join link.

step4.heading: Content and materials
step4.intro: Attach materials and link pre/post-event questionnaires.
step4.materialsHelp: Documents, slides, and links to share before, during or after the event.
step4.questionnairesIntro: Combine reusable templates with questions specific to this event.

step4.templatesEmpty: No templates created. Go to Settings → Questionnaires.
step4.saveDraftAndGoQuestionnaires: Save draft and go to questionnaire management

step5.heading: Review and publish
step5.intro: Double-check and publish (or save as draft).
step5.retentionHelp: After this threshold, personal data is automatically deleted.
step5.privacyDocHelp: Upload a PDF or paste the URL of an alternative privacy notice. Overrides the GDPR template when set.
step5.privacyTextHelp: Short text shown on the registration form; can complement or replace the GDPR template.

orphans.intro: These recordings exist in the storage bucket but are not linked to any event or session in the database. They will be automatically deleted {days} days after discovery. You can mark them as "Keep" to preserve them, "Delete now" to remove on the next cron run, or leave them pending until the timeout.

admin.noToken: Biex timmaniġġja l-avvenimenti, uża l-link tal-moderatur li rċivejt bl-email.

admin.noAccountNeeded: Mhemmx bżonn ta' kont — il-link tal-moderatur huwa l-aċċess tiegħek biex timmaniġġja l-avveniment.

form.expectedParticipantsHint: Just an estimate for infrastructure sizing. This is not a hard cap: registrations beyond this number are accepted and the infra scales automatically.
form.expectedSenderRatioHint: Percentage of attendees with mic or webcam on. Classic webinar 10-20%, panel 50-100%. Leave empty to inherit the site default.

jvbPreview.title: Estimated JVB capacity
jvbPreview.videoDisabled: Video disabled: all attendees count as receivers.
jvbPreview.warnInherited: With {participants} attendees and the inherited ratio ({defaultPct}%), the estimate relies on the site default. Large events should set an explicit value (webinar 5-20%, meeting 30%, workshop 60%).
jvbPreview.warnCeiling: Estimate at the configured max ({max} pods). If real attendance or senders exceed the estimate, bridges may saturate. Consider raising the cap or lowering maxParticipants.

form.gracePeriodHint: How many minutes past the scheduled end to keep the call open. Shown as a non-intrusive banner to attendees during overtime.
form.autoStartRecordingDesc: When the event starts, recording begins on its own (the moderator is not prompted). Late joiners immediately find a catch-up player available.
form.dataRetentionHint: Wara dan il-perjodu, ir-reġistrazzjonijiet tal-parteċipanti, il-mistoqsijiet Q&A u kwalunkwe reġistrazzjoni bil-vidjo se jiġu mħassra awtomatikament.
form.waitingRoomAudioUrlHint: Daħħal URL ta' fajl MP3 għall-mużika fis-sala tal-istennija. Ħallih vojt biex tuża l-awdjo predefinit.
form.permissionsOffDesc: Il-moderaturi biss jistgħu jattivawhom. Il-parteċipanti jridu jgħollu idhom.
form.permissionsNote: Il-bidliet fil-permessi japplikaw għal parteċipanti ġodda.
form.privacyPolicyTemplateEmpty: This template has no text yet. Edit it from Settings › GDPR templates.
form.privacyPolicyTemplateHint: Templates are managed under Settings › GDPR templates. ★ marks the default.
form.privacyPolicyTextHint: Ikteb it-test tal-avviż dwar il-privatezza. Se jidher inline fil-formola tar-reġistrazzjoni.
form.retentionPreviewIntro: Wara {days} ġurnata mit-tmiem tal-avveniment, se jiġu mħassra awtomatikament:
form.retentionPreviewKept: L-istatistika aggregata u l-metadejta tal-avveniment jinżammu.
form.templateApplied: Template applikat: {name}. Tista' timmodifika s-settings kollha.

links.moderatorLinkHint: Aqsam dan il-link mal-moderaturi biss. Kull min għandu dan il-link jista' jimmaniġġja l-avveniment.
links.liveRoomHint: Direct link to enter the live room as moderator.

coModerators.introHint: Kull persuna għandha isem viżibbli fil-kamra u token li jista' jiġi revokat indipendentement mil-link prinċipali. Il-kelliema għandhom mikrofonu, kamera u qsim tal-iskrin iżda ma jistgħux jimmoderaw (keċċu, issilenzjaw lil kulħadd, reġistraw).
coModerators.name: Isem viżibbli fil-kamra
coModerators.roleModeratorHint: Moderazzjoni sħiħa: jista' jirreġistra, jissilenzja lil kulħadd, ineħħi parteċipanti.
coModerators.roleSpeakerHint: Jista' jitkellem, juri video u jaqsam l-iskrin. Ma jistax jimmodera l-kamra.
coModerators.confirmRevoke: Tirrevoka l-aċċess ta' din il-persuna? Il-link se jieqaf jaħdem immedjatament.
coModerators.empty: L-ebda aċċess addizzjonali mogħti. Il-link prinċipali tal-moderatur jibqa' l-uniku daħla privileġġata.

settings.title: Settings tas-sit
settings.subtitle: Ikkonfigura d-dehra u l-imġiba tal-pjattaforma għar-riużu tal-PA

sections.languagesDescription: Attiva jew iddiżattiva l-lingwi tal-UE esposti fl-interfaċċja, agħżel il-lingwa awtomatika u personalizza t-traduzzjonijiet.
sections.gdprTemplatesDescription: Oħloq avviżi ta' privatezza li jistgħu jerġgħu jintużaw u jiġu llinkjati ma' kwalunkwe avveniment, u agħżel dak awtomatiku għal avvenimenti ġodda.
sections.emailTemplatesDescription: Personalizza s-suġġett, it-titli u t-testi tal-emails ta' konferma u tfakkira. Ħalli vojt biex tuża t-testi awtomatiċi integrati.
sections.tagsDescription: Create and edit the tags used to filter events

scaling.intro: Parameters that describe the cluster capacity the platform runs on. Defaults are calibrated for Azure F16s_v2 (16 vCPU / 32 GiB) for JVB and F4s_v2 (4 vCPU / 8 GiB) for Jibri. On different hardware tweak these — the scaler recomputes immediately.
scaling.jvbCpuCoresPerPodHelp: CPU cores requested by the JVB container (resources.requests.cpu). Azure F16s_v2 = 16.
scaling.jvbReceiversPerCoreHelp: How many receive-only viewers fit in 1 vCPU. Calibrated to 18.75 (300 webinar ÷ 16 cores) on F16s_v2.
scaling.jvbSendersPerCoreHelp: How many senders (mic+webcam) fit in 1 vCPU. Calibrated to 3.125 (50 all-sender ÷ 16 cores) on F16s_v2.
scaling.jvbMaxReplicasHelp: Hard cap to prevent runaway scale-up. Default 6.
scaling.jibriCpuCoresPerPodHelp: Cores requested by the Jibri container (ffmpeg + headless Chrome). Azure F4s_v2 = 4.
scaling.defaultSenderRatioPctHelp: Share of expected participants that will actually send media (mic+webcam) when the event doesn't specify. Webinar 10-30%, panel 50-100%.
scaling.previewBody: Event with {participants} expected attendees at {ratio}% senders → {senders} senders + {receivers} passive → {cores} estimated cores → {jvbs} JVBs.
scaling.eventGracePeriodMinutesHelp: Extra time granted after the scheduled end before closing the call. 0 = hard stop, -1 = never auto-close (let the idle-cleanup decide), 15 = banner then close after 15 minutes. Each event can override.

header.slimBarDescription: Il-barra rqiqa fin-naħa ta' fuq tal-paġna li tidentifika l-entità superjuri.
header.centerBarDescription: Iż-żona prinċipali tal-header bl-isem tal-applikazzjoni u l-logo.
header.logoUrlHelp: Ħallih vojt biex tuża l-ikona predefinita tal-PA

branding.siteNameHelp: Jidher fil-header, fit-titlu tal-browser u fl-emails

branding.defaultTimezoneHelp: Użat għall-viżwalizzazzjoni tad-dati u l-ħolqien ta' avvenimenti ġodda.

watermark.title: Personalizzazzjoni tal-vidjo
watermark.urlHelp: URL ta' immaġni SVG jew PNG trasparenti. Ħallih vojt biex tuża l-logo tal-organizzazzjoni.

seo.title: Titlu SEO
seo.titleHelp: Titlu li jidher fir-riżultati tat-tiftix u fit-tab tal-browser
seo.descriptionHelp: Deskrizzjoni għall-magni tat-tiftix u l-kondiviżjoni soċjali

LANDING.title: Landing page
LANDING.description: Hero, funzjonalitajiet, avvenimenti li ġejjin u kif taħdem

homepage.customHtmlHelp: HTML li jidher fis-sezzjoni prinċipali tal-paġna ewlenija

footer.noLinks: L-ebda links ikkonfigurati. Se jintużaw dawk predefiniti.

features.guestAccessEnabledHelp: Ippermetti l-aċċess bħala mistieden għall-avvenimenti ħajjin
features.publicRegistrationEnabledHelp: Kulħadd jista' joħloq avvenimenti (jekk disattivat, l-amministraturi biss)
features.calendarPublicHelp: Ippubblika l-kalendarju tal-avvenimenti. Iż-żitaturi jistgħu jaraw l-avvenimenti skedati.
features.parseTitleKickerHelp: If an event title contains the "|" character, the part before it is rendered as a small uppercase label above the main title. Example: "Coffee chat | Trying the new OSS tool" → label "COFFEE CHAT" + title "Trying the new OSS tool".
features.jvbScalingHelp: Control how long to wait before shutting down an idle video node, and how early to start it for a scheduled event.
features.jvbInactiveGraceMinutesHelp: How long the conference must stay empty before the video node is scaled down. Recommended 45 minutes. Range 5-240.
features.jvbPreScaleMinutesHelp: How many minutes before startsAt to boot the video node for a scheduled event. Recommended 10 minutes.
features.jvbStressWarnPercentHelp: Above this threshold the scaler adds 1 extra JVB replica even if predictive sizing doesn't require it. Default 50.
features.jvbStressCriticalPercentHelp: Above this threshold the scaler adds 2 extra JVB replicas. Default 70. Must be higher than warn.
features.jvbProvisioningTimeoutMinutesHelp: After how many minutes since startsAt an event without JVB ready is flagged as 'degraded' on the status page. Default 15. Covers node cold-start (~3-5 min) plus safety margin.
features.statusPollIntervalSecondsHelp: How often the /status page refreshes from the browser. Default 30. Lower values = fresher data but more load on the app.

templates.deleteConfirm: Żgur li trid tħassar dan it-template?
templates.pickerSubtitle: Agħżel template biex tikkonfigura minn qabel is-settings tal-avveniment, jew aqbeż biex tikkonfigura kollox manwalment.

instantCall.title: Videocall istantanja
instantCall.subtitle: Oħloq videocall minnufih u aqsam il-link. L-ebda bżonn ta' skedar.
instantCall.passwordHint: If set, guests must type this password to join. Minimum 4 characters. Moderators don't need it.
instantCall.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
instantCall.maxParticipantsHint: Raise this if you expect a larger audience: the scaler uses this number to decide how many JVB replicas to allocate. Instant calls have no pre-scaling, so for more than ~50 participants prefer a scheduled event with at least 15 minutes' lead time.
instantCall.hint: Kulħadd jista' jixgħel il-mikrofonu, il-webcam u jaqsam l-iskrin. Int biss tista' tirreġistra u ttemm il-videocall.

files.title: Fajls u materjali
files.deleteConfirm: Żgur li trid tħassar dan il-fajl?
files.noFiles: L-ebda fajls imtella'. Uża l-buttuna "Ittella' fajl" biex iżżid materjali.

materials.title: Event materials
materials.subtitle: Attachments, links and resources shared before, during and after the event.
materials.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

gdprTemplates.title: GDPR templates
gdprTemplates.subtitle: Create and manage reusable privacy notices shared across events. A template marked as default is pre-selected on new events.
gdprTemplates.emptyState: No templates yet. Create one to reuse the same privacy text across multiple events.
gdprTemplates.usedByEvents: {count, plural, =0 {No events linked} =1 {1 event linked} other {# events linked}}
gdprTemplates.confirmDelete: Delete template "{name}"? {count, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 event will lose its reference.} other {# events will lose their reference.}}

form.name: Internal name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Short notes to recognise the template
form.bodyPlaceholder: Paste the privacy notice text for this locale…
form.isDefault: Use as default for new events
form.isDefaultHint: The default template is pre-selected on the new event form. Only one template can be the default at a time.

errors.saveFailed: Save failed. Check the fields and retry.

emailTemplates.title: Mudelli tal-email
emailTemplates.subtitle: Personalizza s-suġġett, it-titli u t-testi tal-emails tranżazzjonali. Oqsma mħollija vojta jużaw it-testi awtomatiċi integrati.
emailTemplates.resetDone: Il-personalizzazzjoni tneħħiet: se jintuża t-test awtomatiku.
emailTemplates.confirmReset: Tneħħi l-personalizzazzjoni? Se jintuża t-test awtomatiku integrat.
emailTemplates.placeholdersHelp: Daħħal dawn it-tokens f'kull qasam — meta tintbagħat, jiġu sostitwiti bid-data vera tal-avveniment.

fields.subject: Suġġett
fields.heading: Titlu prinċipali
fields.headingHint: Titlu li jidher fuq nett tal-korp tal-email.
fields.bodyIntroHint: Test qabel it-tabella bid-dettalji tal-avveniment. Utli għal messaġġ ta' merħba jew kuntest żejjed.
fields.ctaLabelHint: Tikketta tal-buttuna prinċipali li twassal għall-link personali.
fields.infoNoteHint: Kaxxa ta' twissija safra taħt il-buttuna. Ħalliha vojta biex taħbiha.
fields.footerNoteHint: Test li jidher fil-footer taħt il-firma tal-organizzazzjoni.

errors.saveFailed: L-issejvjar falla. Iċċekkja l-oqsma u erġa' pprova.
errors.resetFailed: Ma setax titneħħa l-personalizzazzjoni. Erġa' pprova.

languages.title: Ġestjoni tal-lingwi
languages.subtitle: Ikkonfigura l-lingwi disponibbli u personalizza t-traduzzjonijiet
languages.defaultLocaleDescription: The default language is used as fallback when a translation is not available and as the primary language of the site.
languages.enabledLocalesDescription: Select which EU languages to make available in the user interface. The default language is always enabled.
languages.localesDescription: Agħżel il-lingwi disponibbli għall-interfaċċja tal-utent. It-Taljan huwa obbligatorju bħala lingwa predefinita.
languages.saveNote: Il-bidliet fil-lingwi disponibbli jeħtieġu restart biex jieħdu effett fl-URLijiet.
languages.translationOverridesDescription: Override default translations for enabled languages. Useful for organisation-specific terminology.
languages.overridesDescription: Issostitwixxi t-traduzzjonijiet predefiniti għal din il-lingwa. Uża n-notazzjoni bil-punt (eż. common.appName).

infrastructure.title: Infrastruttura
infrastructure.subtitle: Status tal-komponenti u konfigurazzjoni tal-ambjent

jibri.title: Reġistrazzjoni (Jibri)
jibri.configureHint: Ir-reġistrazzjoni bil-vidjo teħtieġ Jibri. Ikkonfigura l-istoriġġ biex tattivaha.

infrastructure.note: Il-bidliet fl-infrastruttura jsiru permezz tal-Helm values u l-pipeline CI/CD.

instantCalls.title: Instant calls
instantCalls.subtitle: List of instant videocalls
instantCalls.deleteConfirm: You are about to delete {count} instant calls and all associated data (sessions, recordings). This action cannot be undone.
instantCalls.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 2 characters long.

hero.title: Start a new videocall
hero.subtitle: Spin up an instant Jitsi room, get the moderator link, and join in seconds.

status.idleTooltip: Idle for {idle} min — auto-close after {grace} min of inactivity

sessions.title: Call sessions
sessions.empty: No sessions recorded yet. Live sessions are listed here automatically as soon as the moderator joins the room.
sessions.name: Name
sessions.deleteConfirm: Delete this session and its recording?

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: Real-time infrastructure and performance monitoring dashboard
monitoring.prometheusUnavailable: Prometheus is not configured. Set the PROMETHEUS_URL environment variable to enable advanced monitoring.
monitoring.chatSseHelp: Live-chat SSE subscribers. Load heuristic: ~300 SSE/pod is comfortable.
monitoring.cpuHelp: 5m CPU rate aggregated across all app replicas.
monitoring.memHelp: Pod RSS memory — useful to spot memory leaks.
monitoring.scaleToZeroHelp: IDLE is the normal state for an event with no traffic past the grace period. On the next user visit it transitions to PROVISIONING and then LIVE.

bulk.deleteConfirm: You are about to permanently delete {count} events and all associated data (registrations, sessions, recordings, Q&A, polls). This action cannot be undone.
bulk.archiveConfirm: You are about to archive {count} events. Archived events are hidden from the public listing but their data is preserved.

eventsList.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No events} one {# event} other {# events}}
eventsList.registeredCount: {count, plural, =0 {No registrations} one {1 registration} other {# registrations}}

tags.title: Tag management
tags.subtitle: Create, edit and delete the tags used to classify and filter public events.
tags.deleteConfirm: Delete tag "{name}"? It will also be removed from any events it is linked to.
tags.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only (e.g. open-webinar).
tags.empty: No tags defined yet. Create the first one with the "New tag" button.
tags.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

eventDetail.questionnaireCount: {count, plural, =0 {No questionnaires linked} one {1 questionnaire linked} other {# questionnaires linked}}

rubrica.title: Address book
rubrica.subtitle: People who have consented to be added to the address book (GDPR art. 6.1.a). Profile information is updated automatically on every re-registration.

questionnairesPage.title: Questionnaires
questionnairesPage.subtitle: Reusable question templates for pre-registration and post-event questionnaires.

questionnaireResponses.title: Questionnaire responses
questionnaireResponses.subtitle: Aggregations by question, filterable by event, phase and date range.

eventQuestionnaires.title: Questionnaires — {eventTitle}
eventQuestionnaires.subtitle: Configure a pre-registration and/or post-event questionnaire combining templates and ad-hoc questions.

email.confirmationKeepNote: Żomm din l-email — fiha l-link personali tiegħek biex taċċessa l-avveniment.
email.reminderNote: L-avveniment li rreġistrajt għalih jibda f'inqas minn siegħa. Uża l-link hawn taħt biex tidħol.

hero.title: Avvenimenti pubbliċi diġitali
hero.subtitle: Pjattaforma għal webinars, preżentazzjonijiet u laqgħat pubbliċi tad-Dipartiment għat-Trasformazzjoni Diġitali

video.title: Vidjokonferenza
video.desc: Ipparteċipa f'avvenimenti pubbliċi sa 300 parteċipant. L-ebda software xi tniżżel.

qa.title: Mistoqsijiet u Tweġibiet
qa.desc: Staqsi mistoqsijiet matul l-avveniment u vvota għall-aktar importanti. Il-moderatur iwieġeb ħaj.

privacy.title: Privatezza u Sigurtà
privacy.desc: Dejta protetta u konformi mal-GDPR. Infrastruttura self-hosted fl-Italja.

upcoming.title: Avvenimenti li ġejjin
upcoming.noEvents: L-ebda avvenimenti skedati. Erġa' ċċekkja dalwaqt!

step2.title: Irċievi l-link tiegħek
step2.desc: Email bil-link personali tiegħek ta' aċċess

step3.title: Ipparteċipa
step3.desc: Idħol fl-avveniment mill-browser tiegħek, bla installazzjonijiet

polls.title: Stħarriġ
polls.noPolls: L-ebda stħarriġ għalissa. Il-moderatur se joħloqhom matul l-avveniment.

materials.title: Materjali
materials.confirmDelete: Żgur li trid tħassar dan il-materjal?

consent.recording: Nagħti l-kunsens tiegħi għar-reġistrazzjoni tal-awdjo/vidjo ta' dan l-avveniment
consent.recordingRequired: Il-kunsens għar-reġistrazzjoni huwa obbligatorju biex tipparteċipa f'dan l-avveniment
consent.futureCommunications: Nixtieq nirċievi informazzjoni dwar avvenimenti futuri organizzati mid-DTD
consent.addressBook: I want to be added to the DTD address book to be invited to similar events
consent.addressBookHelp: Separate consent (GDPR art. 6.1.a). You can withdraw it at any time using the "Remove me from the address book" link in emails. Your name and organization are taken from your registration profile.

export.title: Id-dejta tiegħi
export.subtitle: Itlob kopja tad-dejta personali assoċjata mal-indirizz email tiegħek, kif previst mill-Art. 15 tal-GDPR.
export.emailInvalid: Jekk jogħġbok daħħal indirizz email validu
export.noData: L-ebda dejta misjuba għal dan l-indirizz email.
export.error: Ġara żball. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' pprova aktar tard.
export.rateLimited: Wisq talbiet. Jekk jogħġbok erġa' pprova wara siegħa.

privacy.title: Avviż dwar il-privatezza
privacy.intro: Din il-paġna tiġbor fil-qosor l-ipproċessar tad-dejta personali relatata mal-użu tal-pjattaforma Eventi DTD u l-parteċipazzjoni fl-avvenimenti pubbliċi ospitati.

controller.title: Kontrollur tad-dejta
controller.body: Id-dejta personali tiġi pproċessata fil-qafas tal-attivitajiet istituzzjonali tad-Dipartiment għat-Trasformazzjoni Diġitali biex issostni l-ġestjoni teknika u organizzattiva tal-avvenimenti pubbliċi online.

data.title: Dejta pproċessata u finijiet
data.body: Il-pjattaforma tipproċessa biss id-dejta strettament meħtieġa għar-reġistrazzjoni u l-parteċipazzjoni fl-avvenimenti, bħall-isem, l-indirizz email u kwalunkwe qasam fakultattiv ikkonfigurat mill-organizzatur. Id-dejta tintuża biex jintbagħat il-link personali ta' aċċess, biex tiġi ġestita l-attendenza, biex jintbagħtu t-tfakkiriet meta applikabbli, u biex jiġu ssodisfatti l-obbligi tas-sigurtà tas-servizz.

retention.title: Żamma u drittijiet
retention.body: Id-dejta tinżamm għall-perjodu kkonfigurat għal kull avveniment u mbagħad tiġi mħassra awtomatikament, sakemm ma japplikawx obbligi legali differenti. Is-suġġetti tad-dejta jistgħu jeżerċitaw id-drittijiet tagħhom skont il-GDPR fi kwalunkwe ħin, inkluż l-aċċess, ir-rettifika u t-tħassir, permezz tal-kanali istituzzjonali tad-Dipartiment.

note.title: Itlob id-dejta tiegħek
note.body: Jekk ipparteċipajt f'avveniment u trid tivverifika liema dejta personali hija assoċjata mal-indirizz email tiegħek, tista' tuża l-funzjonalità ddedikata disponibbli fuq il-pjattaforma.

accessibility.title: Dikjarazzjoni ta' aċċessibbiltà
accessibility.intro: Id-Dipartiment għat-Trasformazzjoni Diġitali huwa impenjat li jagħmel din il-pjattaforma aċċessibbli, skont ir-rekwiżiti applikabbli għas-servizzi diġitali tas-settur pubbliku.

commitment.title: Impenn għall-aċċessibbiltà
commitment.body: Il-pjattaforma hija ddisinjata b'komponenti li huma allinjati mas-sistema tad-disinn .italia u b'attenzjoni għan-navigazzjoni bil-keyboard, l-istruttura semantika tal-kontenut u l-leġibbiltà tal-interfaċċja fid-dimensjonijiet prinċipali tal-iskrin.

status.title: Status tal-konformità
status.body: Verifiki u titjib tal-aċċessibbiltà huma kontinwi. Kwalunkwe kwistjoni residwa tiġi indirizzata progressivament bħala parti mill-evoluzzjoni tas-servizz u l-attivitajiet ta' manutenzjoni regolari.

feedback.title: Feedback u kuntatti
feedback.body: Biex tirrapporta ostakli ta' aċċessibbiltà jew diffikultajiet fl-użu tas-servizz, l-utenti jistgħu jikkuntattjaw lid-Dipartiment permezz tal-kanali istituzzjonali tiegħu, billi jispeċifikaw il-paġna kkonċernata u deskrizzjoni qasira tal-problema.

legalNotes.title: Noti legali
legalNotes.intro: L-aċċess għall-pjattaforma Eventi DTD u l-użu tagħha huma soġġetti għal dawn in-noti, li jiġbru fil-qosor it-termini ġenerali tal-użu u l-informazzjoni prinċipali dwar is-servizz.

ownership.title: Titolarità tas-servizz
ownership.body: Il-pjattaforma hija promossa mid-Dipartiment għat-Trasformazzjoni Diġitali u hija magħmula disponibbli għall-organizzazzjoni u l-parteċipazzjoni f'avvenimenti pubbliċi istituzzjonali online.

usage.title: Użu tas-servizz
usage.body: L-utenti huma obbligati li jużaw is-servizz b'mod korrett, mingħajr ma jikkompromettux is-sigurtà tal-pjattaforma, id-disponibilità tal-funzjonalitajiet jew it-tmexxija regolari tal-avvenimenti. Abbuż jew użu impropju jistgħu jwasslu għal restrizzjonijiet fl-aċċess għas-servizz.

liability.title: Limitazzjoni tar-responsabbiltà
liability.body: Filwaqt li jiġu adottati miżuri tekniċi u organizzattivi xierqa, id-Dipartiment ma jistax jiggarantixxi n-nuqqas assolut ta' interruzzjonijiet jew malfunzjonamenti dovuti għal kawżi mhux prevedibbli, attivitajiet ta' manutenzjoni jew fatturi esterni. Ir-responsabbiltajiet legali jibqgħu regolati mil-liġi applikabbli.

security.title: Sigurtà u trasparenza
security.intro: Il-kodiċi sors ta' din il-pjattaforma huwa pubbliku u huwa suġġett għal kontrolli tas-sigurtà awtomatizzati. Din il-paġna tiġbor l-għodod ta' trasparenza disponibbli għal min juża s-servizz.

openSource.title: Software open source
openSource.body: Il-pjattaforma sħiħa tinħareġ bħala software liberu. Il-kodiċi sors jista' jiġi eżaminat, imniżżel u verifikat minn kulħadd, skont il-prinċipji ta' trasparenza tal-Amministrazzjoni Pubblika Taljana.

sbom.title: SBOM (Lista tal-komponenti tas-software)
sbom.body: Kull rilaxx ippubblikat fuq GitHub jinkludi SBOM f'format SPDX għall-immaġni tal-kontejner u SBOM f'format CycloneDX għad-dipendenzi npm tal-applikazzjoni. Il-fajls huma mehmużin direttament mar-rilaxx u jistgħu jintużaw għall-verifiki tas-sigurtà u tal-konformità.

scorecard.title: OpenSSF Scorecard
scorecard.body: Ir-repożitorju jiġi analizzat perjodikament minn OpenSSF Scorecard, li jevalwa awtomatikament għexieren ta' prattiki tas-sigurtà tal-proġett (protezzjoni tal-friegħi, workflows bi privileġġi minimi, commits iffirmati, ġestjoni tad-dipendenzi). Il-punteġġ attwali huwa pubbliku.

scanning.title: Skenjar awtomatiku
scanning.body: Id-dipendenzi jiġu mmonitorjati b'mod kontinwu permezz ta' Dependabot u npm audit. Il-pipeline tar-rilaxx jipproduċi immaġini traċċabbli permezz tat-tikketta org.opencontainers.image.revision, li torbot kull immaġni mal-commit eżatt minn fejn ġiet mibnija.

disclosure.title: Rapportar ta' vulnerabbiltajiet
disclosure.body: Il-politika ta' żvelar responsabbli hija deskritta fil-fajl SECURITY.md tar-repożitorju. Il-problemi ta' sigurtà jistgħu jiġu rrapportati b'mod kunfidenzjali skont l-istruzzjonijiet ipprovduti hemmhekk.

serviceInventory.title: Provider service inventory
serviceInventory.intro: For this instance, the document below lists both the software dependencies (DEV) and the operational services (OPS) that make up the platform. It is published in CycloneDX 1.6, an OWASP open standard that describes code libraries and third-party managed services in a single document.
serviceInventory.notPublishedBody: The operator of this instance has not yet published a service inventory. The SERVICE_INVENTORY_URL configuration variable has not been set for this deployment.
serviceInventory.fetchErrorBody: The inventory JSON file is currently unreachable. Please try again later or contact the service owner.

sections.componentsIntro: Libraries, containers and OS packages that form the application. Tied to the code version; reproducible by anyone with access to the source.
sections.servicesIntro: Third-party managed services this instance depends on. Tenant-scoped information that changes whenever the operator reconfigures the deployment or switches provider.

stack.title: Architecture at a glance
stack.intro: A high-level view of the four layers that make up the platform: from user access down to the runtime platform.

access.title: Access
access.sub: Web entry point and TLS termination

stack.note: The complete list of components and services, with versions, hashes and technical properties, is available in the sections above and in the downloadable JSON.

status.title: Status tas-sistema
status.subtitle: Ħarsa ġenerali f'ħin reali tal-istatus tas-servizzi tal-pjattaforma.
status.jvbStandby: Standby — jiġi attivat awtomatikament meta meħtieġ
status.jvbStandbyDetail: Scale-to-zero attiv — l-ebda avvenimenti skedati. In-nodi JVB se jinħolqu awtomatikament qabel ma jibda avveniment.
status.jvbOctoActive: Octo active: {bridges} bridges, {relayMbps} Mbps inter-bridge relay
status.staleJvbDetail: At least one active event has been waiting longer than the configured timeout and the video bridge isn't available yet. Check the cluster autoscaler or JVB pod logs.
status.staleJibriDetail: At least one event with recording enabled has been waiting longer than the configured timeout and Jibri isn't available yet.

infraMap.title: Mappa tal-infrastruttura
infraMap.subtitle: Viżwalizzazzjoni f'ħin reali tal-arkitettura u l-istatus tas-servizzi

descriptions.redis: Real-time chat message exchange between servers
descriptions.smtp: Jibgħat emails ta' konferma u tfakkiriet

app.healthy: Il-portal web qed jaħdem korrettament u qed iwieġeb għat-talbiet.

database.degraded: Id-database qed twieġeb, iżda aktar bil-mod minn tas-soltu. L-operazzjonijiet jistgħu jieħdu aktar ħin.
database.down: Id-database mhijiex qed twieġeb. Il-pjattaforma ma tistax taħdem sew.

redis.healthy: Real-time chat service is responding correctly.
redis.degraded: Real-time chat service is slow: messages may reach other servers with delay.
redis.down: Real-time chat service is unreachable. Live chat cannot fan out messages between servers — messages are still persisted to the database but users don't see each other in real time.

jitsiWeb.healthy: Is-sala tal-vidjokonferenza hija aċċessibbli u lesta għall-avvenimenti.
jitsiWeb.down: Is-sala tal-vidjokonferenza mhijiex aċċessibbli. Mhuwiex possibbli tibda jew tidħol fl-avvenimenti.

prosody.healthy: Il-messaġġistika interna bejn is-servizzi tal-vidjo qed taħdem korrettament.
prosody.down: Il-messaġġistika interna mhijiex aċċessibbli. Is-servizzi tal-vidjo ma jistgħux jikkomunikaw ma' xulxin.

jicofo.healthy: Il-koordinatur tal-konferenzi huwa attiv u qed jimmaniġġja s-sessjonijiet.
jicofo.down: Il-koordinatur tal-konferenzi mhuwiex aċċessibbli. Mhuwiex possibbli toħloq konferenzi ġodda.

jvb.healthy: Il-pont tal-vidjo huwa attiv u qed jittrażmetti l-awdjo/vidjo lill-parteċipanti.
jvb.scaling: Il-pont tal-vidjo qed jipprepara għal avveniment li ġej. Is-servers qed jinħolqu awtomatikament.
jvb.standby: Il-pont tal-vidjo huwa standby. Se jiġi attivat awtomatikament qabel ma jibda avveniment skedat.
jvb.stale: An event has been waiting for the video bridge longer than the configured timeout. Check the cluster autoscaler and JVB pod logs.

jibri.healthy: Is-servizz tar-reġistrazzjoni huwa lest u disponibbli.
jibri.busy: Is-servizz tar-reġistrazzjoni huwa attiv u qed jirreġistra sessjoni għaddejja.
jibri.down: Is-servizz tar-reġistrazzjoni mhuwiex aċċessibbli. L-avvenimenti ma jistgħux jiġu rreġistrati.
jibri.standby: Ir-reġistrazzjoni tal-vidjo mhijiex ikkonfigurata. L-avvenimenti mhux se jiġu rreġistrati.
jibri.unconfigured: Video recording is not configured (no storage backend). Events will not be recorded.
jibri.stale: An event with recording enabled has been waiting for Jibri longer than the configured timeout. Check Jibri pod logs.

smtp.healthy: Is-servizz tal-email huwa kkonfigurat u lest biex jibgħat in-notifiki.
smtp.standby: Is-servizz tal-email mhuwiex ikkonfigurat. L-emails ta' konferma u t-tfakkiriet mhux se jintbagħtu.

impacts.database: Il-pjattaforma ma tistax tgħabbi l-avvenimenti, timmaniġġja r-reġistrazzjonijiet, jew tissejvja d-dejta.
impacts.redis: Live chat messages don't fan out across servers. Users only see messages sent on their own pod.
impacts.jitsiWeb: Il-parteċipanti ma jistgħux jaċċessaw is-sala tal-vidjokonferenza.
impacts.prosody: Is-servizzi tal-vidjo ma jistgħux jikkomunikaw. Il-konferenzi mhux se jaħdmu.
impacts.jicofo: Mhuwiex possibbli toħloq jew timmaniġġja vidjokonferenzi ġodda.
impacts.jvbScaling: Il-pont tal-vidjo qed jiġi attivat. L-avveniment se jkun jista' jibda dalwaqt.
impacts.jvbStale: An event has been waiting for the bridge longer than the configured timeout: participants cannot join.
impacts.jibri: L-avvenimenti ma jistgħux jiġu rreġistrati. Il-parteċipanti jistgħu xorta jipparteċipaw.
impacts.jibriStale: An event with recording enabled has been waiting for Jibri past the timeout: the session is not being recorded.
impacts.smtp: L-emails ta' konferma tar-reġistrazzjoni u t-tfakkiriet mhux se jintbagħtu.

overallVerdicts.operational: Is-servizzi kollha qed jaħdmu korrettament. Il-pjattaforma hija kompletament operattiva.
overallVerdicts.degraded: Xi servizzi qed jesperjenzaw dewmien. Il-pjattaforma hija operattiva iżda l-prestazzjoni tista' tkun imnaqqsa.
overallVerdicts.outage: Servizz wieħed jew aktar mhumiex disponibbli. Xi funzjonalitajiet tal-pjattaforma jistgħu ma jaħdmux.

infraMap.verdictSectionSubtitle: Dettalji dwar is-servizzi li jeħtieġu attenzjoni

wordcloud.title: Word Cloud
wordcloud.promptPlaceholder: eż. X'qed tistenna minn dan l-avveniment?

pages.privacyNotConfigured: Avviż dwar il-privatezza għadu mhux ikkonfigurat.
pages.accessibilityNotConfigured: Dikjarazzjoni ta' aċċessibbiltà għadha mhix ikkonfigurata.

waiting.connectedParticipants: {count, plural, =0 {L-ebda parteċipanti} =1 {parteċipant 1 ikkonnettjat} one {# parteċipant ikkonnettjat} few {# parteċipanti konnessi} many {# parteċipanti konnessi} other {{count} parteċipanti konnessi}}
waiting.enterLiveDesc: Ipparteċipa ħaj. Tista' dejjem taċċessa r-reġistrazzjoni wara l-avveniment.
waiting.watchFromStartDesc: Ara r-reġistrazzjoni mill-bidu u aqbad ħaj meta trid.
waiting.recordingAvailableAfter: Ir-reġistrazzjoni se tkun disponibbli wara l-avveniment.
waiting.autoRefreshHint: Il-paġna se taġġorna awtomatikament meta jibda l-avveniment.
waiting.peopleWaiting: {count, plural, =0 {} =1 {persuna 1 qed tistenna} one {# persuna qed tistenna} few {# persuni qed jistennew} many {# persuni qed jistennew} other {{count} persuni qed jistennew}}
waiting.jvbScalingDetail: Is-servers tal-vidjo qed jinxtegħlu. Din l-operazzjoni tieħu madwar 2 minuti.
waiting.warmingUpDetail: We're spinning up the video servers. Get yourself ready in the meantime — everything will be live in 2-3 minutes.
waiting.netiquetteBullet1: Arrive a few minutes early to test your microphone and camera
waiting.netiquetteBullet2: Turn camera and mic on only when speaking — raise your hand to request the floor
waiting.netiquetteBullet3: Use chat for quick exchanges, Q&A for questions to the speakers
waiting.netiquetteBullet4: Recording, when enabled, is controlled by moderators and marked with a red indicator
waiting.watchCatchupDesc: Watch the partial recording and catch up with the live stream when you want
waiting.chatPreviewHint: Read what other participants are saying while you get ready
waiting.startEventError: Error starting the event. Please try again.
waiting.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
waiting.chatLockedMessage: Enter your name to join the event chat.

recording.publishDesc: Agħmel il-vidjo aċċessibbli fuq il-paġna tal-avveniment
recording.retentionNote: Il-vidjo se jsegwi xorta waħda r-retention GDPR tal-avveniment
recording.deleteConfirm: Żgur? Il-vidjo se jiġi mħassar definittivament.
recording.notConfigured: Jibri mhux ikkonfigurat. Ir-reġistrazzjoni bil-vidjo mhijiex disponibbli.
recording.disabledHint: Video recording is not enabled for this event. To enable it open the Settings section above and toggle "Recording" on.

postEvent.feedbackEnabled: Survey tal-feedback attiva fi tmiem l-avveniment
postEvent.dataRetentionNote: Id-dejta personali tal-parteċipanti se tiġi mħassra skont iż-żamma tal-avveniment ({days} ġurnata). Il-kontenut tal-avveniment jibqa' disponibbli sakemm il-paġna tkun viżibbli.
postEvent.availableUntil: Dan l-avveniment u l-kontenut tiegħu se jkunu disponibbli sa {date}.

provisioning.descriptionFromIdle: The room had been paused due to inactivity to save energy. We're restarting it now — this usually takes 2-3 minutes.
provisioning.descriptionColdStart: We're setting up the virtual room for this event. It takes about 2-3 minutes: you'll be redirected automatically when everything is ready.
provisioning.tempError: Retrying to reach the server, no action needed.
provisioning.scaleToZeroNote: To reduce environmental impact, video nodes are powered off when nobody is in a call. They restart automatically on the first join.

optOut.title: Remove me from the DTD address book
optOut.intro: You are about to withdraw your consent to be listed in the DTD address book. After confirmation you will no longer be contacted for invitations to similar events.
optOut.missingToken: The link is invalid or incomplete. Please check the original email.
optOut.invalidToken: The link is expired or invalid. Contact the event organizer for help.
optOut.notFound: No person matches this link — they may already have been removed.
optOut.previewHeader: You are about to remove from the address book:
optOut.warning: This does not delete historical event registrations.
optOut.successBody: Your data is no longer in the DTD address book.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

deviceCheck.permissionNeeded: Allow camera and microphone to test them. You can also join without.

garden.peopleInGarden: {count, plural, =0 {Nobody in the garden} one {1 person in the garden} other {# people in the garden}}
garden.hintKeyboard: Move with WASD or arrow keys
garden.pickerHelp: This character represents you in the waiting garden. You can change it any time.
garden.hintBanner: Press the arrow keys to walk around the garden
